description: Intelligent spawning config — controls how many claude -p calls scripts make based on data volume

auto_approve.rule: 1 call per 10 PENDING_REVIEW entries, capped at 50

venture_pipeline_brokering.rule: 1 call per 5 DAG steps, skip steps with no new data since last run

user_sim_refiner.rule: Only refine ventures that had new alpha entries or state changes since last refine

autonomous_integrator.rule: Only process newly approved entries since last run. 0 new = 0 calls.

ceo_agent.rule: Strategic orchestration needs full reasoning — always 1 Opus call

offpeak_builder.rule: Only build assets for ventures with new actionable items. 0 items = 0 calls.

lean.description: Minimal token burn. Only CEO + auto_approve + critical integrations.

standard.description: Normal operation. All scripts active with variable spawning.

aggressive.description: Maximum throughput. All scripts at max_calls. Use when plan has headroom.
